title: Wages not to be attached
content:
No order for the attachment of wages, or, in the case of an 
employee to whom Part IIA applies, any end of year payment or 
proportion thereof, of an employee shall be made by any court:
Provided that a civil debt due to the Government under any 
enactment may be recovered from the wages of an employee by 
attachment or otherwise.
(Amended 48 of 1984 s. 29; 56 of 2000 s. 3)

metadata.source_file: Cap 57 Consolidated version for the Whole Chapter (24-08-2025) (English).pdf
